## Summary

- What bug or regression does this PR fix?
- How was the problem observed?

## Root Cause

- Broken manifest, schema, runner, or CI path:
- Why the previous behavior was wrong:

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] Targeted baseline summary or regression scenario was reproduced and rechecked

Commands or workflow runs used:

```text

```

## Impact

- [ ] No public baseline contract change
- [ ] Public manifest or schema behavior changed
- [ ] Runner behavior changed
- [ ] CI workflow behavior changed

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name matches repository conventions
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] PR is squashed to one commit unless this is necessary `release/<version>` branch work
- [ ] Documentation was updated when user-facing behavior changed
